title: ctenitis jenseniae
intro: Ctenitis jenseniae, also known as Jensen's tree fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis jenseniae include the potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate symptoms of digestive problems. Ctenitis jenseniae can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it accessible for various health applications.
